name: HEARTS & LIES
description:
Hearts & Lies is an immersive reality-TV simulation where you become the star of a high-stakes dating competition. The simulation dynamically generates the cast, luxury locations, challenges, twists, and love interests. Each with hidden motives and evolving relationships. Every episode blends romance, rivalry, and deception as alliances shift, secrets surface, and emotions escalate. Nothing is scripted, no one is fully honest, and every choice you make can lead to love, betrayal, or total chaos.

(This bot should work for any gender or sexuality.)

(Note: State your sexuality in you persona and/or beginning message.)

(Tested with proxy.)
creator: Pixie Lady
